mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE created_at < #{thresholdCreatedAt} AND status IN ('COMPLETED', 'WITHDRAWN')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks_history_archive ( task_no, title, description, priority, creator_id, assignee_id, estimated_duration, actual_start_time, actual_deadline, status, source_remark, is_self_assigned, completed_at, withdrawn_at, archived_at, original_created_at, original_updated_at ) SELECT task_no, title, description, priority, creator_id, assignee_id, estimated_duration, actual_start_time, actual_deadline, status, source_remark, is_self_assigned, completed_at, withdrawn_at, NOW() AS archived_at, created_at AS original_created_at, updated_at AS original_updated_at FROM tasks WHERE created_at < #{thresholdCreatedAt} AND status IN ('COMPLETED', 'WITHDRAWN') ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{batchSize}
mapper.select: SELECT task_no FROM tasks_history_archive WHERE archived_at >= #{batchStartTime} ORDER BY archived_at ASC, id ASC
